title: Internal Error: .. Canonical variable should be kept or have module refs
body:
Commit 5e1fc6e2 introduced a new "Internal Error" when processing otherwise well-tested and portable code.
I don't understand what the message is trying to tell me.

```
%Error: Internal Error: oscope_top.sv:142:17: ../V3DfgPasses.cpp:329: Canonical variable should be kept or have module refs
  142 | application_top application_top(
      |                 ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
This is part of a pretty big code base, and I haven't started trying to reduce it to a usable test case.
If you want to follow along at home, clone https://github.com/BerkeleyLab/Bedrock (master branch is fine).
Then
```
make -C projects/oscope/bmb7_cu Voscope_top_tb
```
Besides Verilator, you'll need yosys and nmigen==0.2,
